title: The Uncertain Future of the Countryside
subtitle: 乡村的未来：在城市化浪潮中何去何从

paragraphs.en: With population increases and global urbanisation ever accelerating, much attention is focused on the sustainability of our cities and scarce attention is paid to the countryside. Rural life is associated with closely-knit communities, sense of belonging, and a simple, tranquil life. Yet whilst some or all of these elements exist in the countryside, so do conservatism and a lack of employment opportunities.
paragraphs.zh: 随着人口增长和全球城市化进程不断加速，人们的注意力多集中在城市的可持续性上，而乡村则鲜有关注。乡村生活往往与紧密的社群联系、归属感以及简单宁静的生活联系在一起。然而，尽管乡村或许具备部分或全部这些特质，保守主义和就业机会匮乏同样存在。

paragraphs.en: And it is mostly due to the latter that rural communities are suffering. Attracted by the improved economics of urban areas, country-dwellers across the world are moving out, contributing to the excessive crowdedness of densely populated cities, and leaving the countryside in desolation. So how can the countryside ensure its survival among these changes; or should it at all?
paragraphs.zh: 而乡村社区遭受困境，主要也正源于就业机会匮乏。受城市地区经济条件改善的吸引，世界各地的乡村居民纷纷迁出，导致人口密集的城市愈发拥挤，而乡村则日渐荒凉。那么，乡村该如何在这些变化中求得生存？或者说，它究竟该不该继续存在下去？

paragraphs.en: Due to both the distance between residences and facilities and often intermittent public transport, those living in the countryside are heavier automobile users. Rural dwellers also use more energy maintaining their mostly detached buildings. We may be piled up like boxes in the city, but this brings energy efficiency that the countryside cannot match.
paragraphs.zh: 由于住宅与公共设施之间距离遥远，加之公共交通常常班次稀疏，乡村居民对汽车的依赖程度更高。农村居民在维护其大多为独栋的建筑时，也消耗着更多的能源。我们或许在城市里像盒子一样堆叠居住，但这带来的能源效率却是乡村无法比拟的。

words.meaning: adj. 间歇的；断断续续的

paragraphs.en: Rural energy requirements result in higher carbon emissions per person than in the city, so it is actually irresponsible to endorse such a lifestyle choice. Protecting the countryside is a hot topic. Those who have made their fortunes in the city often buy second homes in the countryside, visiting intermittently for a sample of a supposedly simple life.
paragraphs.zh: 农村的能源需求导致其人均碳排放量高于城市，因此倡导这种生活方式选择实际上是不负责任的。保护乡村是一个热门话题。那些在城市发家致富的人，常常在乡村购置第二套房产，间歇性地来此体验一下所谓的简单生活。

paragraphs.en: The side-effect of this is that house prices are pushed up due to increased demand, leaving them unaffordable for local people. A solution has yet to be found for this challenge, for market forces are further forcing residents out of the countryside. For those who believe in rural preservation, this is deplorable.
paragraphs.zh: 这样做的副作用是，需求增加推高了房价，令当地居民望而却步。这一挑战至今仍未找到解决之道，因为市场力量正进一步将居民逼离乡村。对于信奉乡村保护的人而言，这无疑令人扼腕。

words.meaning: adj. 可悲的；令人遗憾的

paragraphs.en: Whilst an idealised view of the countryside is common, the reality is that rural life has continuously evolved. Industrialisation brought an increase in divisions of labour, changing social links between rural people. The internet has introduced once foreign cultures into the countryside.
paragraphs.zh: 尽管对乡村的理想化看法相当普遍，但现实是，乡村生活一直在持续演变。工业化带来了劳动分工的深化，改变了农村居民之间的社会联系。互联网则将曾经陌生的文化引入了乡村。

paragraphs.en: Improved travel connections and affordability have made the world more accessible, creating a "global village". Considering these changes, surely an evolving countryside is inevitable. Perhaps the countryside should also prepare itself for massive population increases in the future.
paragraphs.zh: 交通连接和可负担性的改善使世界变得更容易触达，一个“地球村”由此形成。考虑到这些变化，乡村的不断演变无疑是必然的。也许乡村也应为未来可能出现的大规模人口增长做好准备。

paragraphs.en: With cities across the world growing rapidly, how will the current urban generation respond to the inevitable social changes of mass urbanisation? Will the longing for a simpler life become stronger, fueling a rural renaissance? As the world continues to urbanise, the voices calling for rural preservation may well grow louder.
paragraphs.zh: 随着世界各地城市飞速扩张，当前的城市一代将如何应对大规模城市化带来的不可避免的社会变革？对简单生活的渴望会否愈发强烈，从而催生一场乡村复兴？随着世界持续城市化，呼吁保护乡村的声音很可能会愈发响亮。

paragraphs.en: But change is inevitable. We know that the world is going to see new cities emerging from the dust and current cities growing into megacities, but the future of the countryside is less clear.
paragraphs.zh: 但变化是不可避免的。我们知道，世界将目睹新城市从尘土中崛起，现有城市发展为巨型都市，然而乡村的未来却远没有那么清晰。
